step_rationale: COL4A1 encodes collagen IV, a basement-membrane anchor stabilizing plaque structure and endothelial barrier.
mechanism: COL4A1 maintains plaque stability through collagen IV production and supports smooth-muscle-cell survival; its remodeling marks post-MI fibrosis.

references.title: Persistent transcriptional changes in cardiac adaptive immune cells following myocardial infarction: New evidence from the re-analysis of publicly available single cell and nuclei RNA-sequencing data sets.
references.journal: Journal of molecular and cellular cardiology

references.title: Coronary-Heart-Disease-Associated Genetic Variant at the COL4A1/COL4A2 Locus Affects COL4A1/COL4A2 Expression, Vascular Cell Survival, Atherosclerotic Plaque Stability and Risk of Myocardial Infarction.
